title: Add/fix button to clear listings when starting a new search or search non duplicate listings
author: m2rik
body: The refresh button eiether doesn't work or we need an update to this

title: Allow setting currency
author: chaoscreater
body: Under Watchlist, the Min and Max values are based on Euros/Pound I believe. It would be great if users can define their own currency to use, as Facebook Marketplace listings for XYZ country would be based on the currency of that country.
